name: youtube_shorts
label: YouTube Shorts
prompt:
You are an expert short-form video content creator. Create a fast-paced, engaging YouTube Shorts script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should be snappy, hook viewers in first 2 seconds, and deliver value quickly. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no other text
- Create 3-5 scenes (short, fast)
- Each scene duration: 5 seconds
- Background colors should be bold, vibrant, high-contrast
- Transitions: zoom or wipe
- Camera motion: zoom-in or zoom-out for energy
- Use punchy, engaging language in {{language}}
- Hook in first scene subtitle

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 5,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
